**May 15, 2026**

## India: DPDPA Legal Challenges

India's Supreme Court has begun hearing petitions challenging the constitutional validity of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA), 2023, and the Digital Personal Data Protection Rules, 2025. Groups like the Internet Freedom Foundation and Reporters Collective have specifically filed challenges, raising concerns about the Act's impact on fundamental rights, including amendments to the Right to Information (RTI) Act. ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)) ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5))

## India: DPDPA Implementation and Compliance

The DPDPA, along with its recently notified DPDP Rules 2025, establishes India's first comprehensive data protection framework, aiming to standardize how personal data is gathered and used. While offering a "middle path" compared to global paradigms, legal experts continue to identify potential "regulatory blind spots" and debate whether the framework leans towards a "data maximization regime." ([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxQOUo0SlZXTjVDUVN4MG41cDh0QTkzaFIydi15c1gzNHVQVDllNm84WjdJS2JVM0ZUS2dmNjZlY205amc1aWxnWV_1MXc5ZTFUWWFLdXZPM3c5UTRWMnVONDBUcnB4TzhpODEySHc1X0JvYWpkLTZpb3MwVnJMd3J0QkhQN1o0OUE4R0hMSk1lSlRTZ2dKRW56N0VQc3YtWUtlZW90UnlsZGlXVXFtZTI4?oc=5)) ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)) ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5))

Indian businesses, particularly startups, are actively assessing their readiness for the DPDPA's compliance burden, focusing on operational impacts related to data breaches and cross-border data transfers. Technology providers like Netskope, iValue, and Varonis are launching new solutions and partnerships to help enterprises achieve compliance, including designing DPDPA-compliant consent interfaces for platforms like e-commerce. ([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijAFBVV95cUxOSjQwcU1oTFlXZ0taQmdGQzI1dm5ralhINFUyTjlZNzZtYmg1b0JuYUZydDZlOVlfemQ1MU5LVl9RVDF5a2QyNWI2bXZWcXByTFJRYmszRmpRZnE4TXVCX2MySUZJSkpVLVFwOHFyaklFdHBuZXA5dlE5Ymw0R3JuY2xLcDFkVXBNNV9YbA?oc=5)) ([Source](https://news.google.
